content:
July 8, 2026 | Enrolled.

Today, I officially entered the rolls of the Jharkhand State Bar Council as an Advocate.

Wearing the robes for the first time is a proud milestone, but more importantly, it marks the start of a serious responsibility. Ready to commit to the discipline of the law, the rigors of the courtroom, and the pursuit of justice.

Thank you to everyone who supported me along the way. Time to get to work.
